glosses.vi: vũ trang; trang bị vũ khí
glosses.hi: हथियारों से लैस करना; शस्त्र देना
glosses.ja: 武装させる; 武器を装備させる

sentences.target: Je m'arme de courage avant d'appeler.

translations.fr: Je m'arme de courage avant d'appeler.
translations.es: Me armo de valor antes de llamar.
translations.de: Ich nehme all meinen Mut zusammen, bevor ich anrufe.
translations.it: Mi faccio coraggio prima di chiamare.
translations.zh-Hans: 打电话前我先鼓起勇气。
translations.ru: Перед звонком я собираюсь с духом.
translations.pt: Eu crio coragem antes de ligar.
translations.he: אני אוסף אומץ לפני שאני מתקשר.
translations.vi: Tôi lấy hết can đảm trước khi gọi.
translations.nl: Ik verzamel moed voordat ik bel.
translations.uk: Перед дзвінком я збираюся з духом.
translations.hi: कॉल करने से पहले मैं हिम्मत जुटाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Przed zadzwonieniem zbieram się na odwagę.
translations.nb: Jeg tar mot til meg før jeg ringer.
translations.sv: Jag samlar mod innan jag ringer.
translations.ro: Îmi fac curaj înainte să sun.
translations.da: Jeg tager mod til mig, før jeg ringer.
translations.ja: 電話をかける前に気持ちを整える。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Pronominal verb (s'armer), present indicative, 1st person singular; reflexive clitic me elided to m' before vowel-initial verb form.
Preposition introducing a complement (here ‘courage’) after the pronominal verb s'armer.
Common noun, abstract, complement of the preposition de.
Preposition ‘avant’ forming the complex preposition ‘avant de’ before an infinitive.
Infinitive verb introduced by elided preposition de (d'), complement of ‘avant’ in the structure ‘avant de + infinitif’.

sentences.target: Tu t'armes de patience au guichet.

translations.fr: Tu t'armes de patience au guichet.
translations.en: You brace yourself with patience at the counter.
translations.es: Te armas de paciencia en la ventanilla.
translations.de: Am Schalter wappnest du dich mit Geduld.
translations.it: Allo sportello ti armi di pazienza.
translations.pt: No balcão, você se arma de paciência.
translations.vi: Bạn tự nhủ phải kiên nhẫn ở quầy.
translations.nl: Bij het loket bewapen je je met geduld.
translations.hi: काउंटर पर तुम धैर्य बटोरते हो.
translations.pl: Przy okienku uzbrajasz się w cierpliwość.
translations.nb: Ved skranken væpner du deg med tålmodighet.
translations.id: Di loket, kamu membekali diri dengan kesabaran.
translations.sv: Vid luckan beväpnar du dig med tålamod.
translations.ro: La ghișeu te înarmezi cu răbdare.
translations.da: Ved skranken væbner du dig med tålmodighed.
translations.ja: 窓口では我慢する心構えをする。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Pronominal verb (s'armer), present indicative, 2nd person singular; reflexive clitic te elided to t' before vowel-initial verb form.
Preposition introducing the complement ‘patience’ with pronominal verb s'armer.
Common noun, abstract, complement of the preposition de.
Contraction of the preposition à and the definite article le (à + le → au), introducing the locative complement.
Common noun, location complement governed by ‘au’.

sentences.target: On va armer l'alarme avant de partir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va aʁme lalɑʁm avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/

translations.fr: On va armer l'alarme avant de partir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va aʁme lalɑʁm avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/
translations.en: We're going to arm the alarm before leaving.
translations.es: Vamos a activar la alarma antes de irnos.
translations.de: Wir schalten die Alarmanlage scharf, bevor wir gehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 离开前我们把警报设防。
translations.yue: 我哋走之前會啟動保安系統。
translations.ru: Перед уходом мы поставим сигнализацию на охрану.
translations.pt: Vamos armar o alarme antes de sair.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ kích hoạt báo động trước khi rời đi.
translations.ar: سنقوم بتفعيل الإنذار قبل أن نغادر.
translations.nl: We schakelen het alarm in voordat we weggaan.
translations.uk: Перед відходом ми поставимо сигналізацію на охорону.
translations.hi: चलने से पहले हम अलार्म को सक्रिय करेंगे.
translations.el: Πριν φύγουμε, θα οπλίσουμε τον συναγερμό.
translations.nb: Vi skal aktivere alarmen før vi drar.
translations.id: Sebelum berangkat, kami akan mengaktifkan alarm.
translations.sv: Vi ska aktivera larmet innan vi går.
translations.ro: Vom activa alarma înainte de a pleca.
translations.da: Vi aktiverer alarmen, før vi går.
translations.ja: 出かける前に警報を作動させる。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/collective subject pronoun, often used for colloquial ‘we’, 3rd person singular agreement.
Auxiliary ‘aller’ in present indicative, 3rd person singular, forming the near future with an infinitive.
Main verb in the infinitive, complement of the auxiliary ‘va’ (near future construction).
Noun with elided definite article (le → l') attached; direct object of ‘armer’.
Preposition ‘avant’ used in the complex ‘avant de’ before an infinitive.
Preposition linking ‘avant’ to the infinitive ‘partir’ (‘avant de + infinitif’).
Infinitive verb, complement of the prepositional sequence ‘avant de’.

sentences.target: Il arme le piège à souris doucement.
sentences.reading: /il aʁm lə pjɛʒ a suʁi dusəmɑ̃/

translations.fr: Il arme le piège à souris doucement.
translations.ipa: /il aʁm lə pjɛʒ a suʁi dusəmɑ̃/
translations.en: He arms the mouse trap gently.
translations.es: Él prepara la trampa para ratones con cuidado.
translations.it: Prepara la trappola per topi con delicatezza.
translations.yue: 佢輕手輕腳咁裝好老鼠夾。
translations.pt: Ele arma a ratoeira com cuidado.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đặt bẫy chuột một cách nhẹ nhàng.
translations.hi: वह चूहेदानी को धीरे से तैयार करता है.
translations.el: Οπλίζει απαλά τη φάκα για ποντίκια.
translations.id: Ia menyiapkan perangkap tikus dengan hati-hati.
translations.ro: El pregătește cu grijă capcana pentru șoareci.
translations.ja: 彼はねずみ捕りをそっと仕掛ける。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘piège’.
Common noun, direct object of ‘arme’.
Preposition linking the noun complement ‘souris’ (piège à souris = mouse trap).
Common noun; invariable form used for singular or plural; complement of the preposition ‘à’.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb ‘arme’.
